source._note: Real 2.2-mi (~3510 m) paved ROAD COURSE at Pueblo Motorsports Park, 3733 N Pueblo Blvd, Pueblo CO. From OSM highway=raceway ways 558378826+558378823+558378824 (drag-strip staging spur excluded). Native ring winding is CW; fixes kept CW. Resampled to 3 m via scripts.gps.from_track. Flat/rolling road course — elevation from USGS 3DEP bare-earth (do NOT flatten); NO banking (not an oval).

road_profile._doc: Flat road course — no banking. dips/cambers intentionally empty; deck follows bare-earth 3DEP.

route._orientation_doc: Research 2026-07-20: Pueblo Motorsports Park is CLOCKWISE ONLY (track rules); our ring is already CW. S/F on the wide west-side front straight near its south end (~38.3000,-104.6774), raced NNW-bound. Pit lane: east of the front straight (driver's right), ~350 m.
